item.title: Genotype-phenotype modeling of light ecotypes in Prochlorococcus reveals genomic signatures of ecotypic divergence
item.description: EB, CV are co-primary authors who contributed equally.

item.title: From sequence to signature: Uncovering multiscale AMR features across bacterial pathogens with supervised machine learning
item.description: AG, EB, CV, EW are co-primary authors who contributed equally.

item.title: Integrative transcriptome-based drug repurposing in tuberculosis
MolEvolvR: a web-app for characterizing proteins using molecular evolution and phylogeny
item.description: FSA, JTB, LS are co-primary authors who contributed equally; they are listed alphabetically.
